title: Maureen Mcvicker
compiled_truth: Maureen Mcvicker is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-27), Maureen Mcvicker sent 399 and received 1425 emails, totalling 1824 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (61), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (60), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (56), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (44), [Mark Palmer](people/mark-palmer) (43). Mailbox folders observed: 2001_witchunt, _americas, aadepartment, administrative, advertising, attachments.
